freshnessTargets: Shift from passive discovery to a small, intentional action
Use weather as active texture, not just reflective support
avoidMotifs: Finding forgotten accessories on a desk
narrativeNudges: Frame a tiny errand as a forward-looking choice, not a nostalgic look back
captionAdvice: Start with a present-tense, sensory observation of a small action
imageAdvice: Focus on a hand or partial presence interacting with a new object family
summary: Move from desk-bound rediscovery to a gentle, intentional micro-action in the cool evening.
